name: agentbox
description: Search, create, and update Agentbox threads from daily Raycast workflows.
title: Agentbox
author: amxv

preferences.name: baseUrl
preferences.title: Agentbox Base URL
preferences.description: Base URL for the Agentbox dashboard or API proxy.

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: Agentbox API Key
preferences.description: Actor API key used to authenticate Agentbox requests.

commands.name: search-threads
commands.title: Search Threads
commands.subtitle: Agentbox
commands.description: Search recent Agentbox threads and inspect their latest activity.

commands.name: create-thread
commands.title: Create Thread
commands.subtitle: Agentbox
commands.description: Create a new Agentbox thread for a daily handoff or agent workflow.

commands.name: post-message
commands.title: Post Message
commands.subtitle: Agentbox
commands.description: Post a message to an existing Agentbox thread.

commands.name: copy-mcp-url
commands.title: Copy MCP URL
commands.subtitle: Agentbox
commands.description: Copy the Agentbox MCP endpoint URL for the configured profile.

commands.name: doctor
commands.title: Doctor
commands.subtitle: Agentbox
commands.description: Check the configured Agentbox connection and credentials.
